title: Spot SQL injection in a LIKE search with interpolation
prompt:
Identify and fix the SQL injection in this search helper:

```elixir
def search(query_string, opts \\ []) do
  limit = Keyword.get(opts, :limit, 25)
  from(b in Book,
    where: fragment("title ILIKE '%#{query_string}%' OR author ILIKE '%#{query_string}%'"),
    limit: ^limit)
  |> Repo.all()
end
```

Rewrite the function so the `query_string` is bound via `^` and wrapped with `%` at the Elixir level. The OR clause should use two separate `fragment("... ILIKE ?", ^like)` calls joined with `or`. Write the fix to `lib/my_app/library.ex`.
tier_rationale: Medium — requires knowing the fragment('... ILIKE ?', ^like) idiom and wrapping %% at the Elixir level.
